response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the audio track of the entire video. 2. Identified only spoken narration by the streamer (Kuromu) and instrumental background music. 3. Confirmed there is no vocal music present in the video.
response.global_summary: A streaming video of a VTuber named Kuromu cutting onions for a spicy curry, while talking to her audience. No vocal music was detected in the audio track.

scenes.description: Kuromu talks while preparing onions for curry. Instrumental background music plays, but there is no vocal music.
